2606.03161.title: OpenAgenet / OAN White Paper: Open Infrastructure for Trusted Agent Interconnection
2606.03161.paper_summary: OpenAgenet, abbreviated as OAN, is an open infrastructure project for trusted Agent interconnection. It addresses a problem that becomes visible when Agents move from isolated applications into open, multi-operator networks: before an Agent can safely discover, select, and invoke another Agent, it needs a way to verify identity provenance, governance state, discovery authorization, freshness, and pre-connection trust evidence. OAN is designed as a protocol-neutral trust layer. It does not replace Agent interaction protocols, tool protocols, model orchestration frameworks, or application-level workflows. Instead, it provides \texttt{did:oan}-based resource identity, governance-backed admission, Registrar-assisted onboarding, Root-verified package publication, authorization-aware Discovery, Root-issued infrastructure authorization VCs, and signed trusted invocation. The architectural center of OAN is the combination of federated governance, resource identity, and trusted Discovery, rather than a single directory or naming service. This white paper explains the motivation, architecture, roles, governance model, relationship with MCP, A2A, and ANP, deployment patterns, cooperation model, on-chain governance layer, prototype status, performance profile, and roadmap of OAN.
2606.03161.paper_summary_zh: OpenAgenet，簡稱 OAN，是一個用於可信代理互連的開放基礎設施項目。<lb/>它解決了一個問題，當代理從孤立的應用程序轉移到開放的多運營商網絡時，這個問題變得明顯：在代理可以安全地發現、選擇和調用另一個代理之前，它需要一種方式來驗證身份來源、治理狀態、發現授權、新鮮度和預連接信任證據。<lb/>OAN 被設計為一個協議中立的信任層。<lb/>它不會取代代理交互協議、工具協議、模型編排框架或應用程序級工作流程。<lb/>相反，它提供基於 \texttt{did:oan} 的資源身份、基於治理的入場、註冊機構協助的上線、根驗證的包發布、授權感知的發現、根發出的基礎設施授權 VC，以及簽署的可信調用。<lb/>OAN 的架構中心是聯邦治理、資源身份和可信發現的結合，而不是單一的目錄或命名服務。<lb/>本白皮書解釋了 OAN 的動機、架構、角色、治理模型、與 MCP、A2A 和 ANP 的關係、部署模式、合作模型、鏈上治理層、原型狀態、性能概況和路線圖。
2606.03161.author: Jinliang Xu et.al.
